entry.title: Calling Secured iFlow from SAPUI5
entry.content: Can somebody explain how can I call the Integration Flow SECURED Endpoint from SAP UI5? To call it in Postman, I first fetch the acess_token with token endpoint then request the json resource with that token. How do I implement it with SAP UI5, so the token of the currently logged in users is user? Also how make the SAP UI5 get the token when user logins? I implemented this scenario 100 time in Angluar and React with custom backend scenarios. There is literally 0 documentation on how to do this in the SAP environment.

entry.title: bind bound oData function to UI5 control
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

i want to bind a bound function to an control as described here: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/b54f7895b7594c61a83fa7257fa9d13f

we have great examples for unbound functions:

 

<VBox id="getAvailableItems" binding="{path : '/GetAvailableItems(...)', parameters : {$select : ['ProductName', 'ProductId']}}">
    <List id="xyz" items="{value}">
        <items>
            <ObjectListItem title="{ProductName}" />
        </items>
    </List>
</VBox>

 

but for bound functions only the js part is referenced:

 

var ...
    oSalesOrderContext = oTable.getSelectedItem().getBindingContext(),
    oAction = oModel.bindContext("name.space.InvoiceCreated(...)", oSalesOrderContext);
 
oAction.invoke()...

 

I've been trying to do this directly with a binding in the xml view for some time now, but it doesn't work. Has anyone got it working?

entry.title: Stock - Multiple materials - need Batch classification
entry.content:
Hi friends

There is a nice SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud App "Stock - Multiple Materials" F1595.

You can add additional SAP fields to data source MMIM_MULTIPLE_MATERIAL_MDL in section Data Source Extensions of the Custom Fields and Logic app and publish your extension: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/d451f280bc3646bb9c3cb0ac37acc34e.html

Unfortunately the "Classification of Batch" is not availble in this scenario.

Do you have any ideas how to create an APP with stock measures and "classification of batch"?

Thank you!

entry.title: Button click event, app routing not working in new projects created on SAP BTP trial
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm facing issues with basic features like Button click event, app routing not working in BTP trial account. I have created a new simple SAPUI5 project and deployed to CF and accessed in Build Workzone. However, when tested locally it is working normally as expected.

Any suggestions what is the reason for this strange behaviour ! 

Sample screenshot of routing in manifest.json:

entry.title: UI5 SmartFilterBar DateRangeType Default Value
entry.content:
I want to set a default value for the last 5 days in SmartFilterBar DateRangeType. Writing the View as below doesn't work. How can I set the default value for LASTDAYS?

<ControlConfiguration
key="CLOSE_DATE"
visibleInAdvancedArea="true"
conditionType="{
module: 'sap.ui.comp.config.condition.DateRangeType',
defaultOperation:'LASTDAYS',
defaultValues: [5]
}"
/>

The expected result is as follows:

entry.title: SAP Build work zone, SAPUI5 app, controller not executing
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I need your expert advice for an issue that I am facing when I deployed a simple UI5 application to cloud foundry.

I have created a simple UI5 which has a button and a label element, on press of which a function is called which displays a MessageBox. 

In view controller, I have added a MessageBox in init, just to verify is init is being called.

When I run the app with no-flp and sandbox, it runs perfectly fine.

When I deployed the app to cf , it is working fine when I open the app from HTML5 applications(I added FLP config while creating project).

Now when i ran the same app on Build Work Zone, the View controller is not loaded. The message box in init as well as button event is not displayed.  I observed that when I inspect the app, the controllers are not loaded in sources tab.

I need your advice for this issue.

entry.title: How to display multiple different fragments on the same Object Page?
entry.content:
I created a Fiori Elements application using the list report & object page template.

I created a custom section by using "Add a custom section to an object page using extensions" with the Guided Development. It added a fragment file, where I created a table that displays a different entity than the one I used for my list report. This table is now displayed in the newly created section.

Now I would like to have a code for a different table with a different entity set, and I want to display either the first or the second table, depending on specific attributes of the current object. Sadly, I don't know how to do that, do I have to create a second fragment file and if so, how do I specify in my controller code which fragment is displayed in the section. 

I know how to access the object attributes, I just don't know how to tell the compiler, which fragment is supposed to be used.

entry.title: SAPUI5 cannot read properties of null (reading 'getText').
entry.content:
SAPUI5 gurus

I'm struggling with an error when I try to launch a Fiori app.

The first time that I visit the app, this runs in a good way. Since the second time, it shows an error:

This app is based on RT_PRNT_LABES1. As you can see, the problem is in ApplicationUtil.js (this is a standard file). I haven't manipulated that standard file.

Every time that I execute the app on SAP Web IDE, it runs correctly.

I tried to cleaned up the cache (frontend), cookies from my browser, but the issue still happening.

Do you have any suggestion?

Best regards.

Vicror Carmona.

entry.title: Close a angular popup from a SAPUI5 button
entry.content:
Dear Techies,

Need a help to find a solution for the below issue:

  1. Parent app Angular app. 
  2. A view with save/cancel button in it  is developed in SAPUI5.
  3. View is embedded in a Angular popup.
  4. With save/cancel I want to close this popup

Need to help in achieving this eventing, any help is highly appreciated.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Overview Page: 2 lines in 1 chart
entry.content:
Hello community, 

after many hours of try and fail, asking the community experts here.

I'm trying to create an SAP Fiori Elements - Overview Page.

In the backend I've written the RAP Odata V2 service (almost no CDS annotations as I mainly use XML annotations via Guided Implementation wizard).

The CDS structure is following (synthetic example):

Date (abap.dats)Price_Germany (int4)Price_USA (int4)
01 December 2024100200
02 December 2024101202
03 December 2024105210

In the Overview Page I've created several cards, including the Line Chart. All good.

The line is displayed properly for Price_Germany.

Now I would like to add another line to the same Line Chart, so I have Price_USA displayed.

Can you please let me know how this can be achieved?

I tried following:

 

<Annotation Term="UI.Chart" Qualifier="ChartQualifier_Prices">
                    <Record Type="UI.ChartDefinitionType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="ChartType" EnumMember="UI.ChartType/Line" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Price Germany vs USA" />
                        <PropertyValue Property="Dimensions">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>Date</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="DimensionAttributes">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Dimension" PropertyPath="Date" />
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartDimensionRoleType/Category" />
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Measures">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>Price_Germany</PropertyPath>
<PropertyPath>Price_USA</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="MeasureAttributes">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Measure" PropertyPath="Price_Germany"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1" />
                                </Record>
                                <Record>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Measure" PropertyPath="Price_USA"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1" />
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>

 

But it is throwing be the error 50017 - incorrect Binding 

Feels like I'm somewhere very close, but can't find a solution and it is frustrating 🙂

Please kindly advise.

entry.title: How to Fetch Logged-In User Details Using SAP User API in Cloud Foundry?
entry.content:
Hi Community! 

I'm currently working on an SAP project deployed in Cloud Foundry, and I'm trying to fetch the logged-in user's details using the User API. My setup includes an xs-app.json with a route to /userapi/currentUser.

Here's what I'm trying to achieve:
Retrieve the user's full name and user ID.

entry.title: UI Error VL02N using Sliptream Engine
entry.content:
There is a UI5 error when executing VL02N using the Slipstream Engine. When users navigate to the Detailed Data for Handling Unit screen, the error: "Rendering has been re-started too many times (21). Add URL parameter sap-ui-xx-debugRendering=true for a detailed analysis."

Please advise on corrective action.

entry.title: How to set Default Value to sap.ui.comp.smartfield.SmartField
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

We have a requirement to add the row to the table with the smart field as f4help and prepoluted values.

the data is coming from the backend, as we are adding the row from the controller in for loop with the filters.

to set the values to smartfield, we have used,

smartfield.setValue() >> not working 

also

new sap.ui.comp.smartfield.SmartField({
                                        value: {
                                            path: "Part",
                                            value: oresponse.results[i].Part,
                                        },
                                        entitySet: "Items",
                                        textInEditModeSource: "ValueList",
})
which is also not working.
in the debugger, it is showing the value but in the app preview, the field is blank.
 
Can anyone suggest ?
 
thanks
Sarita

entry.title: Is there anyway to apply filter to SmartField
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a SmartTable with editTogglable = true.

on the selection of Parts, I need to pass selected value as filter to BatchNumber and SerialNumber.

Is there anyway to pass filter ?

 

Thanks

Sarita

entry.title: how to get the filtered data from the model when using .filter()
entry.content:
Hi SAPUI5 Experts,

I have the ui.table and bind the table with model. I have the filter function and using 

                    oBinding.filter(oFilters, "Application");
to filter the table. 
The result is displayed correct on the table but I need to download the filtered data. When I try to getModel().getData(), I get the full list of items rather than with filtered data. 
 
How can I get the data that is filtered and displayed on the table in the download function.
 
Thanks for your help.
 
Kind Regards

entry.title: sap.m.radiobutton circle not visible
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am facing one issue where in one of my project the sap.m.radio button circle is visible but in the other project it is not visible in the same workspace.

I check the manifest file also and maintain the same sap.ui library but still the circle is not visible

I tried copy paste the working xml view to non working project and the same view(where the button is visible in other project) is not working in this project.

Please have a look to the screenshots. Please suggest 

 

Thanks
Sarita

entry.title: Display customer list standard app new column addition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement in which we need to add a new column (PAN) in the table inside Display Customer List.

I have tried to create a adaptation project on SAP BAS. I was unable to add a new column using the SAPUI5 adaptation editor. 

Fiori App reference library: "Display Customer List application"

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps(%27F2640%27)/S23OP

Any help is greatly appreciated.

Kind Regards,

Avishek

entry.title: SAPUI5: Wrong Deviation Calculation for KPI/DataPoint
entry.content:
I have an SAPUI5 application that is based on an FIORI Elements Overview Page template.
One of my cards on the OVP shows an KPI header with the following values:

  • KPI Value: Average Delivery Delay (in days) for the past 90 days
  • Target Value: Average Delivery Delay (in days) for the past 365 days
  • Automatically calculated deviation of the values  in %

We recently upgraded our system from S/4 2020 SP3 to S/4 2023 SP1. This included updating SAPUI5 libraries from 1.84.6 to 1.120.0. After the upgrade, the deviation calculation shows a wrong value. Before it worked as expected.

                
<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="DataPointDurchschnittLieferverzug">
	<Record Type="UI.DataPointType">
		<PropertyValue Property="Title" String="{@i18n>datapoint_title_durchschnitt_lieferverzug}" />
		<PropertyValue Property="Description" String="{@i18n>datapoint_title_durchschnitt_lieferverzug}" />
		<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="AvgDelivToCmtdDelivDelayInDays" />
		<PropertyValue Property="CriticalityCalculation">
			<Record Type="UI.CriticalityCalculationType">
				<PropertyValue Property="ImprovementDirection" EnumMember="UI.ImprovementDirectionType/Minimize" />
				<PropertyValue Property="ToleranceRangeHighValue" Decimal="3" />
				<PropertyValue Property="DeviationRangeHighValue" Decimal="5" />
			</Record>
		</PropertyValue>
		<PropertyValue Property="TrendCalculation">
			<Record Type="UI.TrendCalculationType">
				<PropertyValue Property="ReferenceValue" Path="AvgDlvToCmtdDlvDelayPast365Day" />
				<PropertyValue Property="UpDifference" Decimal="1" />
				<PropertyValue Property="StrongUpDifference" Decimal="2" />
				<PropertyValue Property="DownDifference" Decimal="-1" />
				<PropertyValue Property="StrongDownDifference" Decimal="-2" />
			</Record>
		</PropertyValue>
		<PropertyValue Property="ValueFormat">
			<Record Type="UI.NumberFormat">
				<PropertyValue Property="NumberOfFractionalDigits" Int="1" />
			</Record>
		</PropertyValue>
	</Record>
</Annotation>

entry.title: Building Block for Attachments not working in UI5
entry.content:
I'm trying to use the building block for file upload as described here:
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/table/tableUpload

The table is succesfully displayed and loaded. However, I get the some error messages in the console:
- Error on retrieving command shortcut. Command DeleteEntry was not found!
- TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'setProperty')
at Object.updateBindingInfo (TableDelegate.ts:763:26)
at tt._rebind
- The PageReady Event was not fired within the 7000 ms timeout . It has been forced. Please contact your application developer for further analysis

Has anybody already dealt with these kind of issues, every help is appreciated.

entry.title: Async onInit - Route not trigerred
entry.content:
Hi All,

In my UI5 app, I am loading a few fragments conditionally in the onInit method using async/await and hence have declared the onInit method as async . The fragments load fine but the onRouteMatch method I try to run after await does not trigger at all. If I remove all await statements from the code , the the onRouteMatch triggers fine . 

Can someone kindly suggest what could be going wrong here .

Thanks ,

Himanshu
